meridian_skill.description:
Ingest meeting transcripts into brain pages with attendee enrichment, entity
propagation, and timeline merge. A meeting is NOT fully ingested until the
enrich skill has processed every entity.
meridian_skill.name: meeting-ingestion

sections.heading: Contract
lines: checklist:ai-autonomy:

sections.heading: Phase 1: Parse the transcript
lines: use judgment to follow the Phase 1: Parse the transcript guidance:
Extract from the transcript:
item: Attendees (names, roles if available)
item: Date, time, duration
item: Key topics discussed
item: Decisions made
item: Action items with owners
item: Companies and projects mentioned

sections.heading: Phase 2: Create meeting page
lines: codeblock:markdown:

sections.heading: Phase 3: Attendee enrichment (MANDATORY)
lines: use judgment to follow the Phase 3: Attendee enrichment (MANDATORY) guidance:
For EACH attendee:
`gbrain search "{name}"` — does a people page exist?
If NO → create via enrich skill (this is mandatory, not optional)
If YES → update compiled truth with meeting context
Add timeline entry on the person's page:
`gbrain timeline-add <person-slug> <date> "Attended <meeting-title>"`
**Note (v0.10.1):** Once the meeting page is written via `gbrain put`, the
auto-link post-hook automatically creates `attended` links from the meeting
to each attendee whose page is referenced as `[Name](people/slug)`. You don't
need to call `gbrain link` for attendees. You DO still need `gbrain timeline-add`
for dated events (auto-link only handles links, not timeline entries)

sections.heading: Phase 4: Entity propagation (MANDATORY)
lines: use judgment to follow the Phase 4: Entity propagation (MANDATORY) guidance:
For each company, project, or concept discussed:
Check brain for existing page
Create/update as needed
Add timeline entry referencing the meeting
Back-link from entity page to meeting page

sections.heading: Phase 5: Timeline merge
lines: use judgment to follow the Phase 5: Timeline merge guidance:
The same event appears on ALL mentioned entities' timelines. If Alice met Bob at
Acme Corp, the event goes on Alice's page, Bob's page, AND Acme Corp's page

sections.heading: Phase 6: Sync
lines: use judgment to follow the Phase 6: Sync guidance:
`gbrain sync` to update the index

sections.heading: Output Format
lines: Meeting page created. Report: "Meeting ingested: {N} attendees enriched, {N} entities
updated, {N} action items captured."

sections.heading: Anti-Patterns
lines: checklist:ai-autonomy:

meridian_skill.tools:
search
query
get_page
put_page
add_link
add_timeline_entry
meridian_skill.triggers:
"meeting transcript"
"process this meeting"
"meeting notes"
meeting transcript received
